data.title: Write RED tests for scan-docs.sh text extraction and confidence context elevation
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
Extends test-onboarding-scan-docs.sh with behavioral tests for the text extraction and confidence context elevation logic. These tests run RED until T4 implements the extraction logic.

## What to Build
Add to `tests/skills/test-onboarding-scan-docs.sh`:

1. test_extracts_app_name_from_text: Given a temp dir with a text file containing "App name: MyApp", when scan-docs.sh is called, then stdout JSON contains facts entry {"key":"app_name","value":"MyApp","confidence":"high"}
2. test_extracts_stack_signal: Given a text file containing "Built with React and Node.js", when scan-docs.sh is called, then stdout facts array contains a stack entry with value mentioning "react" or "node"
3. test_extracts_wcag_level: Given a text file containing "WCAG AA compliance required", when scan-docs.sh is called, then stdout facts contains {"key":"wcag_level","value":"AA","confidence":"high"}
4. test_facts_elevate_confidence_context: Given a CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT JSON file with stack:"low" and a text file with "python-poetry stack", when scan-docs.sh --context-file=<path> is called, then stdout includes "elevated_dimensions":{"stack":"medium"} (elevation from low to medium for partial signal)
5. test_confidence_never_lowered: Given a CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT JSON file with stack:"high" and a conflicting doc, when scan-docs.sh --context-file=<path> is called, then stdout shows stack still at "high" (never lowered)

These tests FAIL (RED) until T4 implements extraction. Add RED marker [test_extracts_app_name_from_text] to .test-index for plugins/dso/scripts/scan-docs.sh.

## TDD Requirement
These tests run RED before T4 implements text extraction. Run: `bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-scan-docs.sh`

## Test Approach
- Given: temp dir with specifically crafted text document containing known fact signals
- When: scan-docs.sh is invoked (with optional --context-file for elevation tests)
- Then: stdout JSON facts array contains expected key/value/confidence entries

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test-onboarding-scan-docs.sh contains all 5 new extraction test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_extracts_app_name_from_text\|test_extracts_stack_signal\|test_extracts_wcag_level\|test_facts_elevate_confidence_context\|test_confidence_never_lowered' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-scan-docs.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Running the test file exits non-zero (RED — extraction not yet implemented)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-scan-docs.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] RED marker [test_extracts_app_name_from_text] added to .test-index for plugins/dso/scripts/scan-docs.sh
  Verify: grep '\[test_extracts_app_name_from_text\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
